normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 2.24 - Waste Management Plans
scope_summary: Specifies when a waste management plan must accompany a development application in the City of Fremantle and sets broad expectations for on-site waste storage and collection. A plan is mandatory for developments of 4 or more grouped dwellings, all multiple dwellings, constrained lots, and all new non-residential/mixed-use development or substantial changes affecting waste generation. Plans must follow the City's Waste Management Guidelines and relevant WALGA guidelines; all waste storage and removal should occur on-site.

key_numeric_standards.topic: waste management plan trigger - grouped dwellings
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: grouped dwelling developments requiring a waste management plan
